diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,178 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+
+## src/hono.ts
+
+- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point extending HonoBase, configuring default router stack with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter behind SmartRouter.
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, HonoOptions.
+- Simple note: Uses SmartRouter by default with [RegExpRouter, TrieRouter] fallback chain for routing requests.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+
+- Purpose: Base implementation class providing core routing, handler composition, request dispatch, error handling, and middleware support.
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, RouterRoute, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, compose, COMPOSED_HANDLER.
+- Simple note: Stores routes array, manages basePath, provides fetch/request/fire methods, uses internal router for request matching.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module barrel exporting PatternRouter for Hono.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
+- Simple note: Re-export router implementation from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Regex-based pattern matching router that converts path patterns to RegExp anchors at route registration time.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, emptyParams, UnsupportedPathError, endsWithWildcard, paramCount, match.
+- Simple note: Matches routes using pre-built RegExps, handles named params like :id, supports wildcards with *.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module barrel exporting LinearRouter for Hono.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
+- Simple note: Re-export router implementation from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Linear array-based router storing routes sequentially, performing simple string comparison matching against stored paths.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, ROUTES_LOOP, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, emptyParams, checkOptionalParameter, hasStar, hasLabel, params.
+- Simple note: Iterates complete routes array on every match, supports star wildcards and named params with label matching.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module barrel exporting RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
+- Simple note: Exports primary router and optimized prepared variant for production use.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Main router implementation building matcher from trie, caching middleware and routes, handling wildcards and static paths.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, nullMatcher, buildWildcardRegExp, clearWildcardRegExpCache, HandlerWithMetadata, staticMap, paramAssoc, findMiddleware, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT.
+- Simple note: Converts path patterns to trie, builds single RegExp matcher for all routes, supports static path caching for common routes.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+
+- Purpose: Defines matcher types and match function that builds all matchers on first request.
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Result, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, ParamStash, emptyParam, nullMatcher, match.
+- Simple note: Returns [RegExp, handlerData[], staticMap] tuple, caches matcher on router instance.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Optimized pre-built router constructor that accepts matchers upfront, faster for static route sets.
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, #matchers, #relocateMap, #addWildcard, #addPath.
+- Simple note: Accepts pre-built matchers as constructor arguments, avoids runtime matcher building overhead.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie tree node implementation for building router regex patterns from hierarchical paths.
+- Names noticed: Node, Context, ParamAssocArray, PATH_ERROR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, compareKey, regExpMetaChars.
+- Simple note: Tree nodes with #children map, #index, #varIndex, #patterns, inserts path tokens and builds RegExpStr.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie data structure that converts path strings to token arrays for node insertion and RegExp generation.
+- Names noticed: Trie, ReplacementMap, #context, #root, ParamAssocArray, ReplacementMap, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap.
+- Simple note: Parses routes into tokens, handles named groups {pattern}, returns [RegExp, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap].
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module barrel exporting SmartRouter for Hono.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: Re-export router implementation from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Fallback router that tries multiple routers sequentially until one succeeds.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, activeRouter, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, #routers, #routes, match.
+- Simple note: Iterates router array, tries each fully, fails gracefully on UnsupportedPathError, binds match to current active router.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module barrel exporting TrieRouter for Hono.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: Re-export router implementation from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie-based router using Node tree for path searching and handler resolution.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, checkOptionalParameter, #node, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, emptyParams, hasChildren, search, insert.
+- Simple note: Direct trie traversal on match without regex compilation, stores handler sets per method.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie node implementation with method-specific handler sets and pattern matching for dynamic params.
+- Names noticed: Node, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, emptyParams, possibleKeys, score, #methods, #children, #patterns, #order, insert, search, splitPath, getPattern, splitRoutingPath.
+- Simple note: Each node tracks handlers by method, maintains patterns array for regex matching, scores handlers by insertion order.
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Shared test utilities for router benchmarks, provides runTest helper with test suite hierarchy.
+- Names noticed: RunnerTestSuite, runTest, getSuiteHierarchy, skip, newRouter, Match, router, skip, task.
+- Simple note: Defines common test structure, supports test skipping per router, extracts handler and params from match results.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: PatternRouter test suite validating regex pattern matching behavior.
+- Names noticed: UnsupportedPathError, PatternRouter, Duplicate param name, Trailing slash, pattern match.
+- Simple note: Tests basic routing and edge cases like duplicate params (:id twice) which throws UnsupportedPathError.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: LinearRouter test suite validating linear path matching.
+- Names noticed: UnsupportedPathError, LinearRouter, Multi match, params per handler, Capture regex pattern.
+- Simple note: Tests linear array iteration matching, handles star routes and label params, throws for complex patterns.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter test suite validating trie-based regex matcher behavior.
+- Names noticed: UnsupportedPathError, RegExpRouter, Duplicate param name, Ambiguous, Capture Group, Complex, Including slashes.
+- Simple note: Tests staticMap caching, regex generation from trie, rejects ambiguous routes like /:user/entries vs /entry/:name.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: SmartRouter test suite validating fallback router behavior with multiple routers.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, SmartRouter, fallback chain.
+- Simple note: Tests SmartRouter trying RegExpRouter first, then TrieRouter on mismatch, binds match to working router.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: TrieRouter test suite validating direct trie matching.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, insert, search, trie traversal.
+- Simple note: Tests direct trie node traversal for path matching without regex compilation step.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: TrieRouter Node class test suite testing individual node operations.
+- Names noticed: Node, insert, search, Root Node, Basic Usage, Get with *.
+- Simple note: Tests Node.insert and Node.search directly on Node instances before wrapping in TrieRouter.
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts + tests in src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts + tests in src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts + tests in src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts + tests in src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts + tests in src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts and src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
